productDisplayName: French Connection Women Purple Sling Bag
description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Blue velvet upper on a sling bag with a flap that has magnetic closure Has a separator with a zipped pocket Has a shoulder strap Material and Care 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 20 cm Width: 18 cm Depth: 10 cm
